violations.text: The floor by the dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2026
Sponges were observed being used in the three bay sink. Sponges were discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Lights were observed out in the storage closet and on the prep side of the main kitchen. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The door to the toilet rooms in the dining room are not self-closing. Toilet rooms that open, to area of food prep, service, or dining must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2025
Lights in the main kitchen area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2025
Grout by the walk in coolers was observed low and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment removed ice from machine, establishment is to clean and sanitize machine before resuming use. Ice was burnt off. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
Lighting in the kitchen was observed not in working order. Lights must be maintained in working order. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
